scripts.apps:build:development: pnpm packages:clean && packages:build && pnpm -r --filter=./apps/* run build:development
scripts.apps:build:testing: pnpm packages:clean && packages:build && pnpm -r --filter=./apps/* run build:testing
scripts.apps:build:production: pnpm packages:clean && packages:build && pnpm -r --filter=./apps/* run build:production
